_doc: the scaffold store's gate config — the conservative shape, nothing loosened. a store tunes this file, not mechanism.
_unknown_doc: an unregistered method fails safe-high: fit_critical, always human-gated. the gate never auto-approves what it does not recognise.

expiry_seconds._doc: pending approvals lapse rather than fire on changed conditions: one hour default, thirty minutes when money moves. a lapsed item still wanted is re-proposed with current numbers.

catalog-enrichment._note: reversible auto-approves (recorded, never silent); everything consequential or fit_critical is human-gated.

pricing._note: money-move function; nothing auto in V1 — every price change is gated. money_threshold (minor units) is the trust-ratchet dial: 0 means no amount auto-approves.

policy._note: threshold moves file here — owner-only by construction (gate.move_threshold), each its own ledger record.

mutate_product_field._note: not all content is reversible: a wrong spec is a safety claim, not content. fit-critical fields gate even though they are nominally content; publish and delist raise the class.

policy.move_threshold._note: the meta-action: moving this very table. owner-only through gate.move_threshold; never on any agent-facing surface.

mutate_variant_field._note: variant-level content fields (barcode normalization, sku hygiene). price never travels this method — mutate_price exists and is consequential.
